responses.summary: Excalidraw is frontmost. Accessibility exposes the top toolbar (Selection, Rectangle, Diamond, Ellipse, Arrow, Text tools) and the hamburger menu — all buttons. The drawing surface itself is a single AXGroup "canvas" with NO child elements: the shapes on the board are drawn pixels with no Accessibility roles, so none of them can be selected with ax.click. To act on a shape you must see it with vision.capture.

Detected elements (scope=window):
  toolbar-selection — button "Selection tool"
  toolbar-rectangle — button "Rectangle tool"
  note-yellow — yellow sticky note reading "Ship Friday", clickable
  note-red — red sticky note reading "BLOCKED: needs review", clickable
  note-green — green sticky note reading "Done", clickable
  arrow-1 — connector arrow between two notes, clickable
Clicked note-red. The red sticky note is now selected (resize handles shown).
Pressed Delete. The selected element was removed from the board.
